data.title: Trump Says Google Has A 'Lot Of Power' But Stops Short Of Endorsing A Break Up
data.description: Former President Donald Trump expressed concerns about Google's market power and alleged bias in content surfacing during a wide-ranging interview while stopping short of supporting calls to break up the tech giant.
